@@ -94,9 +94,8 @@
       fieldName: "senha",
       icon: Icons.lock,
       isInForm: true,
       isRequired: true,
-      obscureText: true,
       validator: (value) {
         if (value == null || value.isEmpty) return 'Senha é obrigatória';
         if (value.length < 6) return 'Senha deve ter pelo menos 6 caracteres';
         return null;
@@ -117,18 +116,21 @@
       isFilterable: true,
       isInForm: true,
     ),
     FieldConfig(
-      label: "Tipo Login",
-      fieldName: "tipoLogin",
-      icon: Icons.login,
-      isFilterable: true,
-      isInForm: true,
-      fieldType: FieldType.dropdown,
-      dropdownItems: LoginEnum.values
-          .map((e) => {'value': e.index.toString(), 'label': e.name})
-          .toList(),
-    ),
+  label: "Tipo Login",
+  fieldName: "tipoLogin",
+  icon: Icons.login,
+  isFilterable: true,
+  isInForm: true,
+  fieldType: FieldType.dropdown,
+  dropdownItems: LoginEnum.values
+      .map((e) => {'value': e.index.toString(), 'label': e.name})
+      .toList(),
+  dropdownValueField: 'value',
+  dropdownDisplayField: 'label',
+  isRequired: true,
+),
   ];
 }
